2604.26904.title: ClawGym: A Scalable Framework for Building Effective Claw Agents
2604.26904.paper_summary: Claw-style environments support multi-step workflows over local files, tools, and persistent workspace states. However, scalable development around these environments remains constrained by the absence of a systematic framework, especially one for synthesizing verifiable training data and integrating it with agent training and diagnostic evaluation. To address this challenge, we present ClawGym, a scalable framework that supports the full lifecycle of Claw-style personal agent development. Concretely, we construct ClawGym-SynData, a diverse dataset of 13.5K filtered tasks synthesized from persona-driven intents and skill-grounded operations, paired with realistic mock workspaces and hybrid verification mechanisms. We then train a family of capable Claw-style models, termed ClawGym-Agents, through supervised fine-tuning on black-box rollout trajectories, and further explore reinforcement learning via a lightweight pipeline that parallelizes rollouts across per-task sandboxes.To support reliable evaluation, we further construct ClawGym-Bench, a benchmark of 200 instances calibrated through automated filtering and human-LLM review. Relevant resources will be soon released at https://github.com/ClawGym.
2604.26904.paper_summary_zh: 爪型環境支持在本地文件、工具和持久工作區狀態上進行多步驟工作流程。<lb/>然而，圍繞這些環境的可擴展開發仍然受到缺乏系統性框架的限制，特別是在合成可驗證訓練數據和將其與代理訓練及診斷評估整合方面。<lb/>為了解決這一挑戰，我們提出了 ClawGym，一個支持爪型個人代理開發全生命周期的可擴展框架。<lb/>具體而言，我們構建了 ClawGym-SynData，一個由 13.5K 過濾任務組成的多樣化數據集，這些任務是從以角色為驅動的意圖和基於技能的操作中合成的，並配有現實的模擬工作空間和混合驗證機制。<lb/>然後，我們通過對黑箱回滾軌跡進行監督性微調，訓練了一系列稱為 ClawGym-Agents 的高效爪型模型，並進一步通過輕量級管道探索強化學習，該管道在每個任務的沙盒中並行化回滾。<lb/>為了支持可靠的評估，我們進一步構建了 ClawGym-Bench，一個通過自動過濾和人類-LLM 審查校準的 200 個實例的基準。<lb/>相關資源將很快在 https://github.com/ClawGym 發佈。
2604.26904.author: Fei Bai et.al.
2604.26904.authors: Fei Bai, Huatong Song, Shuang Sun, Daixuan Cheng, Yike Yang, Chuan Hao, Renyuan Li, Feng Chang, Yuan Wei, Ran Tao, Bryan Dai, Jian Yang, Wayne Xin Zhao
